limitations: ai_investment_intensity: Ameren is a utility company; AI references are primarily as a demand driver (data centers as load customers) and a cybersecurity risk vector, not as direct AI investment by Ameren itself. No AI-attributable R&D or capex spend is quantified or named. Score of 2 reflects generic acknowledgment of AI-driven load growth without named AI investment programs by Ameren.

ai_narrative_concreteness: AI is discussed primarily in risk and load-growth contexts, not as a deployed internal initiative. Named categories (generative AI, agentic AI) appear but only in risk framing, not as Ameren-operated use cases. Score of 3 reflects named AI categories without deployment status or metrics.

capex_mentions: Infrastructure investments (natural gas generation, grid build-out) are tied to data center load growth broadly, not specifically AI-attributable capex by Ameren; excluded per anti-inflation rule.
